requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Rwanda RSB-adopted RS/CISPR 14 series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（卢旺达RSB采纳的RS/CISPR 14系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（盧旺達RSB採納的RS/CISPR 14系列）

summary.en: Rwanda does not operate a stand-alone EU-style EMC Directive. Electromagnetic compatibility of household appliances is addressed through Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) standards, which are typically national adoptions of the international CISPR 14 series (IEC/CISPR 14-1 emission, CISPR 14-2 immunity), and through the RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) scheme and Standards Mark (S-Mark) for regulated products. Radio-emitting features (Wi-Fi or Bluetooth smart-home modules) fall under the Rwanda Utilities Regulatory Authority (RURA) type-approval regime rather than RSB. For a standard refrigerator, EMC is verified as part of the conformity assessment supporting the Certificate of Conformity — generally by accepting an IEC/CISPR 14-based test report (e.g., an IECEE CB report) at the destination-inspection or PVoC stage. There is no separate Rwanda EMC self-declaration analogous to the EU EMC Declaration of Conformity; the EMC evidence is folded into the per-consignment CoC. Confirm the exact RS standard reference and PVoC route with RSB, as Rwanda harmonises many electrotechnical standards through the East African Community (EAC).
summary.zh: 卢旺达没有独立的类似欧盟的EMC指令。家用器具的电磁兼容通过卢旺达标准局（RSB）标准处理，这些标准通常是对国际CISPR 14系列（IEC/CISPR 14-1发射、CISPR 14-2抗扰度）的国家采纳，并通过RSB出口前合格评定（PVoC）制度和针对受管制产品的标准标志（S-Mark）实施。具有无线发射功能的产品（Wi-Fi或蓝牙智能家居模块）属于卢旺达公用事业监管局（RURA）的型号核准范围，而非RSB。对于标准电冰箱，电磁兼容作为支撑合格证书的合格评定的一部分进行验证——通常在目的地查验或PVoC阶段接受基于IEC/CISPR 14的检测报告（如IECEE CB报告）。卢旺达没有类似欧盟EMC符合性声明的独立EMC自我声明；电磁兼容证据并入每批货物的合格证书中。请向RSB核实具体RS标准编号及PVoC路径，因卢旺达通过东非共同体（EAC）协调许多电工标准。
summary.zht: 盧旺達沒有獨立的類似歐盟的EMC指令。家用器具的電磁相容通過盧旺達標準局（RSB）標準處理，這些標準通常是對國際CISPR 14系列（IEC/CISPR 14-1發射、CISPR 14-2抗擾度）的國家採納，並通過RSB出口前合格評定（PVoC）制度和針對受管制產品的標準標誌（S-Mark）實施。具有無線發射功能的產品（Wi-Fi或藍牙智慧家居模組）屬於盧旺達公用事業監管局（RURA）的型號核准範圍，而非RSB。對於標準電冰箱，電磁相容作為支撐合格證書的合格評定的一部分進行驗證——通常在目的地查驗或PVoC階段接受基於IEC/CISPR 14的檢測報告（如IECEE CB報告）。盧旺達沒有類似歐盟EMC符合性聲明的獨立EMC自我聲明；電磁相容證據併入每批貨物的合格證書中。請向RSB核實具體RS標準編號及PVoC路徑，因盧旺達通過東非共同體（EAC）協調許多電工標準。

standards_or_laws: RSB Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) scheme — EMC evidence assessed as part of Certificate of Conformity for regulated electrical products
RS CISPR 14-1 (national adoption of IEC/CISPR 14-1) — emission requirements for household appliances and similar apparatus
RS CISPR 14-2 (national adoption of IEC/CISPR 14-2) — immunity requirements for household appliances and similar apparatus
RURA type-approval — applicable only if the appliance contains a radio module (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity — product family standard; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) applies. These standards are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both China (GB 4343.1) and Rwanda's RS adoptions trace to the same CISPR 14 family, the underlying test methodology is closely aligned — but a Chinese CCC EMC report referencing GB 4343.1 is not automatically the document RSB issues a Certificate of Conformity against; an IEC/CISPR-referenced report is the cleaner route.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度——产品族标准；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）适用。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。由于中国（GB 4343.1）和卢旺达的RS采纳均溯源于同一CISPR 14族，底层试验方法高度一致——但引用GB 4343.1的中国CCC电磁兼容报告并非RSB据以签发合格证书的当然文件；引用IEC/CISPR的报告是更清晰的路径。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度——產品族標準；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）適用。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。由於中國（GB 4343.1）和盧旺達的RS採納均溯源於同一CISPR 14族，底層試驗方法高度一致——但引用GB 4343.1的中國CCC電磁相容報告並非RSB據以簽發合格證書的當然文件；引用IEC/CISPR的報告是更清晰的路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions （less than or equal to 16 A/phase） (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: The technical EMC gap between China and Rwanda is small because both reference the CISPR 14 family; the gap is mainly procedural and documentary: (1) Rwanda assesses EMC inside the per-consignment PVoC / Certificate of Conformity rather than via a manufacturer self-declared EMC DoC — so the exporter must route EMC test evidence through the appointed PVoC body (or destination inspection) for each shipment or registration route; (2) the cleanest accepted evidence is an IEC/CISPR 14-based report (ideally an IECEE CB report) rather than a GB 4343.1-only CCC report, because RSB standards are IEC-derived; (3) any Wi-Fi or Bluetooth module shifts that sub-assembly into the separate RURA radio type-approval process, which is independent of the RSB CoC. Rwanda does not impose a distinct harmonic/flicker self-declaration regime equivalent to EN 61000-3-2/-3-3 enforcement; confirm whether the applicable RS standard set includes harmonic limits with RSB.
gap.zh: 中国与卢旺达之间的电磁兼容技术差距较小，因两者均参照CISPR 14族；差距主要在于程序与文件：（1）卢旺达在每批货物的PVoC/合格证书内评估电磁兼容，而非通过制造商自我声明的EMC符合性声明——因此出口商须就每批货物或注册路径，将电磁兼容检测证据提交指定PVoC机构（或目的地查验）；（2）最清晰被接受的证据是基于IEC/CISPR 14的报告（最好是IECEE CB报告），而非仅基于GB 4343.1的CCC报告，因RSB标准源自IEC；（3）任何Wi-Fi或蓝牙模块会将该子组件转入独立于RSB合格证书的RURA无线电型号核准流程。卢旺达不设等同于EN 61000-3-2/-3-3执行的独立谐波/闪变自我声明制度；请向RSB确认适用的RS标准集是否包含谐波限值。
gap.zht: 中國與盧旺達之間的電磁相容技術差距較小，因兩者均參照CISPR 14族；差距主要在於程序與文件：（1）盧旺達在每批貨物的PVoC/合格證書內評估電磁相容，而非通過製造商自我聲明的EMC符合性聲明——因此出口商須就每批貨物或註冊路徑，將電磁相容檢測證據提交指定PVoC機構（或目的地查驗）；（2）最清晰被接受的證據是基於IEC/CISPR 14的報告（最好是IECEE CB報告），而非僅基於GB 4343.1的CCC報告，因RSB標準源自IEC；（3）任何Wi-Fi或藍牙模組會將該子組件轉入獨立於RSB合格證書的RURA無線電型號核准流程。盧旺達不設等同於EN 61000-3-2/-3-3執行的獨立諧波/閃變自我聲明制度；請向RSB確認適用的RS標準集是否包含諧波限值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in effect — EMC conformity to RSB-adopted RS/CISPR 14 standards is assessed within the PVoC / Certificate of Conformity required before import; no separate EU-style EMC self-declaration. RURA type-approval applies only to radio modules
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Rwanda has no EU-style EMC Directive; EMC for refrigerators is verified through RSB-adopted RS/CISPR 14 standards inside the per-consignment PVoC / Certificate of Conformity. Because both Chinese GB 4343.1 and Rwanda's RS standards derive from CISPR 14, technical alignment is good, but the exporter should present IEC/CISPR-based (ideally IECEE CB) test evidence to the PVoC body rather than rely on a GB-only CCC report. Wi-Fi/Bluetooth variants need separate RURA radio type-approval. verified:false — confirm the exact RS reference and PVoC route with RSB.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卢旺达无类似欧盟的EMC指令；电冰箱的电磁兼容通过RSB采纳的RS/CISPR 14标准在每批货物的PVoC/合格证书内验证。由于中国GB 4343.1和卢旺达RS标准均源自CISPR 14，技术对齐良好，但出口商应向PVoC机构提交基于IEC/CISPR的检测证据（最好是IECEE CB），而非依赖仅基于GB的CCC报告。含Wi-Fi/蓝牙的型号需另行办理RURA无线电型号核准。verified:false——请向RSB确认具体RS编号及PVoC路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 盧旺達無類似歐盟的EMC指令；電冰箱的電磁相容通過RSB採納的RS/CISPR 14標準在每批貨物的PVoC/合格證書內驗證。由於中國GB 4343.1和盧旺達RS標準均源自CISPR 14，技術對齊良好，但出口商應向PVoC機構提交基於IEC/CISPR的檢測證據（最好是IECEE CB），而非依賴僅基於GB的CCC報告。含Wi-Fi/藍牙的型號需另行辦理RURA無線電型號核准。verified:false——請向RSB確認具體RS編號及PVoC路徑。
